file.string: Close out and settle your batch.
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
About %1$d characters per line on the printer (Business name font: %2$s). Preview shows how text wraps.
About %1$d characters per line on the printer (Address font: %2$s). Preview shows how text wraps.
Longest line is %1$d characters — will wrap to multiple lines (max ~%2$d per line at %3$s font).
No printers responded on 10.0.0.1–255 port 9100. Try Add manually.
Tap + to add a receipt or kitchen printer.
Network receipt printer failed (in-store still printed). %1$s
Items with a matching printer label route here. Add labels (e.g. Drinks, Grill), then assign the same label on menu items.
Remove this printer from this device and the dashboard? It will no longer receive orders until added again.
That label is already on this printer.
Choose a label that matches a kitchen printer. None = do not print to kitchen.
Enter the unit price for this line.
Enter a valid amount (zero or greater).
When on, staff enter the selling price when adding this item to an order. The amount below is only a suggested default.
Enter a whole number zero or greater.
No labels available. Add labels on kitchen printers first.
No KDS stations assigned for this item.
No KDS devices found. Add a kitchen display in the web dashboard first.
No active paired KDS devices. Check the web dashboard or pair a tablet first.
Tickets for this item appear on the selected kitchen displays (same as web dashboard routing).
All menu items in this category—including every subcategory—route to the kitchen displays you select (same as the web dashboard).
No KDS devices found. Add them in the web dashboard first.
No active paired KDS devices. Check the web dashboard or pair a tablet first.
Clear the saved photo for this item? POS and dashboard will no longer show an image until you add a new one.
No images found. Try another search.
Could not sign in for image search. Try again.
Image search is not available yet: deploy Cloud Functions menuItemImageSearch and menuItemImageCommitPexels (us-central1), then try again. See functions/README.md.
Sign-in required for image search. In Firebase Console → Authentication → Sign-in method, enable Anonymous. Then log out and back into the POS (or restart the app) and try again.
Photos provided by Pexels. Saved copy is stored in your Firebase project.
This will permanently remove this item.
Browse the menu to add items for this order.
No menu categories are available. Check Categories (order types / schedules) in the dashboard.
Nothing new to send to the kitchen.
Could not load items for kitchen print.
Controls when orders appear on the KDS and when kitchen tickets print to LAN printers.
When should orders go to the kitchen?
When Send to Kitchen is clicked
When Send or payment (whichever comes first)
Use labels to route items to specific printers (kitchen, bar, etc.). The KDS uses the same labels synced under Printers in Firestore.
Items with a matching printer label only
When this option is selected, these groups become required choices. Tap to expand.
Remove-style (no charge; shows as "No …" on cart and receipts)
Choose a future date and time
This reservation is no longer active.
Highlighted tables are assigned to this booking.
The table will be freed on the floor plan and can be used for dine-in or new bookings.
%1$s • %2$d seats — tap Confirm or the link icon to place this group
Tap + to book a table. Upcoming visits will appear here.
Only reservations where you tapped Seat guest on Dine-In appear here.
Only active reservations can be cancelled from this list.
Link mode: tap tables of the same shape, then tap the link icon again to save.
Only tables with the same shape can be linked.
Select at least two tables to link.
Tables linked for reservations and dine-in.
This removes the link so each table can be used separately.
Tap a table to start a Dine-In order
Tap a table to reserve it for a guest
This table is marked occupied, but there is no open Dine-In order on it. You can clear the table so guests can be seated again.
Frequent visitor: more than five visits
Order accepted — mark ready when prepared
Order is ready — waiting for driver pickup
Tap here to review, accept, or decline
Enter the 6-digit code shown under Settings → Devices on the MaxiPay dashboard. The code expires in 15 minutes and can be used once.
Device linked. It will appear as enrolled on the dashboard.
This code has expired. Generate a new one on the dashboard.
This terminal was deactivated from the dashboard. Enter a new 6-digit activation code from Settings → Devices → Add device, then tap Link this device.

This device must be linked before anyone can sign in. In the merchant dashboard go to Settings → Devices → Add device, copy the 6-digit code, enter it below, then tap GO. Codes expire in 15 minutes and work once.
You need at least one other modifier group (besides this one) to chain choices. Add another group first, then return here to select which groups this option should open.
Choose what happens after each paid order.
Prompt for receipt type after each order (Print, Email, Text, or Skip)
Print receipt automatically after each order, then ask if the customer wants a receipt
No items yet — add something from the menu
